summary_text: A TypeError occurred in the "noise-to-signal" app, specifically in the "evaluation" page. The error message indicates that the "__init__" method of the "EvaluationConfig" class received an unexpected keyword argument named "enable_summac". This error occurred on line 105 of the "evaluation_view.py" file. The exact cause and solution of the issue are not specified in the provided information.
